MaxLineLength:DashPage.kt$val animBrake by animateFloatAsState(vs.brakePressure.toFloat().coerceIn(0f, 100f), spring(stiffness = Spring.StiffnessHigh), label = "brk")
MaxLineLength:MainActivity.kt$MainActivity$5 -> MorePage(vs, prefs, snackbarHostState, onSettings = { settingsOpen = true }, onCustomDash = { showCustomDash = true })
MaxLineLength:PowerPage.kt$DataCell("CMD AFR", if (vs.commandedAfr > 0) "${"%.3f".format(vs.commandedAfr)}λ" else ph, modifier = Modifier.weight(1f))
MaxLineLength:PowerPage.kt$DataCell("ETC ACT", if (vs.etcAngleActual > 0) "${"%.1f".format(vs.etcAngleActual)}°" else ph, modifier = Modifier.weight(1f))
MaxLineLength:PowerPage.kt$DataCell("ETC DES", if (vs.etcAngleDesired > 0) "${"%.1f".format(vs.etcAngleDesired)}°" else ph, modifier = Modifier.weight(1f))
MaxLineLength:PowerPage.kt$DataCell("HP FUEL", if (vs.hpFuelRailPsi >= 0) "${"%.0f".format(vs.hpFuelRailPsi)} PSI" else ph, modifier = Modifier.weight(1f))

MaxLineLength:PowerPage.kt$DataCell("KR C1", if (hasData) "${"%.2f".format(vs.ignCorrCyl1)}°" else ph, valueColor = krColor(vs.ignCorrCyl1), modifier = Modifier.weight(1f).background(krBg1, RoundedCornerShape(10.dp)))

MaxLineLength:PowerPage.kt$DataCell("KR C2", if (hasData) "${"%.2f".format(vs.ignCorrCyl2)}°" else ph, valueColor = krColor(vs.ignCorrCyl2), modifier = Modifier.weight(1f).background(krBg2, RoundedCornerShape(10.dp)))

MaxLineLength:PowerPage.kt$DataCell("KR C3", if (hasData) "${"%.2f".format(vs.ignCorrCyl3)}°" else ph, valueColor = krColor(vs.ignCorrCyl3), modifier = Modifier.weight(1f).background(krBg3, RoundedCornerShape(10.dp)))

MaxLineLength:PowerPage.kt$DataCell("KR C4", if (hasData) "${"%.2f".format(vs.ignCorrCyl4)}°" else ph, valueColor = krColor(vs.ignCorrCyl4), modifier = Modifier.weight(1f).background(krBg4, RoundedCornerShape(10.dp)))
MaxLineLength:PowerPage.kt$DataCell("LONG FT", if (vs.calcLoad > 0) "${"%.1f".format(vs.longFuelTrim)}%" else ph, valueColor = ltftColor, modifier = Modifier.weight(1f))
MaxLineLength:PowerPage.kt$DataCell("LP FUEL", if (vs.fuelRailPsi > 0) "${"%.0f".format(vs.fuelRailPsi)} PSI" else ph, modifier = Modifier.weight(1f))
MaxLineLength:PowerPage.kt$DataCell("SHORT FT", if (vs.calcLoad > 0) "${"%.1f".format(vs.shortFuelTrim)}%" else ph, valueColor = stftColor, modifier = Modifier.weight(1f))
MaxLineLength:PowerPage.kt$DataCell("WGDC", if (vs.wgdcDesired > 0) "${"%.0f".format(vs.wgdcDesired)}%" else ph, valueColor = accent, modifier = Modifier.weight(1f))
MaxLineLength:PowerPage.kt$SectionLabel("ENGINE MANAGEMENT", collapsible = true, expanded = isExpanded("ENGINE"), onToggle = { expandedSections["ENGINE"] = !isExpanded("ENGINE") })
MaxLineLength:PowerPage.kt$SectionLabel("FUEL TRIMS & AFR", collapsible = true, expanded = isExpanded("FUEL"), onToggle = { expandedSections["FUEL"] = !isExpanded("FUEL") })
MaxLineLength:PowerPage.kt$SectionLabel("THROTTLE & BOOST", collapsible = true, expanded = isExpanded("THROTTLE"), onToggle = { expandedSections["THROTTLE"] = !isExpanded("THROTTLE") })
MaxLineLength:PowerPage.kt$val krBg1 by animateColorAsState(if (vs.ignCorrCyl1 < -1.0) Warn.copy(alpha = 0.08f) else Color.Transparent, tween(400), label = "kr1")
MaxLineLength:PowerPage.kt$val krBg2 by animateColorAsState(if (vs.ignCorrCyl2 < -1.0) Warn.copy(alpha = 0.08f) else Color.Transparent, tween(400), label = "kr2")
MaxLineLength:PowerPage.kt$val krBg3 by animateColorAsState(if (vs.ignCorrCyl3 < -1.0) Warn.copy(alpha = 0.08f) else Color.Transparent, tween(400), label = "kr3")
MaxLineLength:PowerPage.kt$val krBg4 by animateColorAsState(if (vs.ignCorrCyl4 < -1.0) Warn.copy(alpha = 0.08f) else Color.Transparent, tween(400), label = "kr4")
MaxLineLength:VehicleStateTest.kt$VehicleStateTest$val state = VehicleState(boostKpa = 101.325, rpm = 3000.0, speedKph = 80.0, peakBoostPsi = 20.0, peakRpm = 7000.0, peakSpeedKph = 200.0)
MaxLineLength:VehicleStateTest.kt$VehicleStateTest$val state = VehicleState(boostKpa = 250.0, rpm = 6000.0, speedKph = 180.0, peakBoostPsi = 10.0, peakRpm = 5000.0, peakSpeedKph = 150.0)
